rules: Evidence IDs and runtime truth must be readable.
Fallback mode must remain visible in screenshots and video.

references.name: Grafana IRM incident timeline
references.used_for: chronological evidence and decision trail pattern

references.name: Grafana AI Observability dashboards
references.used_for: runtime metrics emphasis: latency, TTFT, tools, quality

checks: no generated artifacts or garbled text
